value.found_quote: Google's Gemini Computer Use, grown from Project Mariner, optimizes for browser workflows where DOM awareness and web-native actions outperform generic screen scraping.
value.rationale: The page repeatedly describes Google's Gemini Computer Use as an existing, available offering, including detailed capability descriptions, comparison matrix entries (Vertex AI, Gemini API, Workspace deployment), and workload recommendations. It is presented as a current, in-use product with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
